children.text:
Find a greater sense of understanding and perspective as you experience one of life’s most challenging journeys.

Preliminary research using in-person meditation training techniques suggests that meditation may help improve quality of life for people with cancer. There is no evidence to suggest that meditation can help to prevent, treat, or cure cancer. It is usually safe to use meditation alongside your cancer treatment, but it is important to talk to your doctor if you have any concerns.
Sorry, this pack is only available to subscribers.
